## Summary
Focused PR isolating only the active `/workbench-v2` path and required production build fix.

Option B guardrails preserved:
- `/workbench-v2` remains owned by `ReviseCockpitClient`
- `ReviseQueueV2Client` remains implementation-only (not direct route owner)
- No duplicate workbench path or competing ledger writer introduced

## File scope proof (required)
```bash
git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD
```

Output:
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClient.tsx`
- `components/revision/ReviseQueueV2Client.tsx`
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts`

## Why each file is included
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClient.tsx`: keeps `/workbench-v2` active owner as cockpit facade.
- `components/revision/ReviseQueueV2Client.tsx`: carries decision payload metadata fields, persistence payload wiring, non-blocking local-first sync behavior, and auto-advance behavior consumed by active route through cockpit.
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts`: production build hardening fix for `tokenizePronounSignal` typed fallback.

## Build / runtime proof
Executed on branch `pr/workbench-v2-option-b-isolated`:

1) Production build:
- `EVAL_OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS=720000 EVAL_PASS_TIMEOUT_MS=720000 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 npm run build`
- Result: **PASS**
- Evidence includes:
  - `✓ Compiled successfully`
  - `✓ Checking validity of types`
  - `✓ Collecting page data`
  - `✓ Generating static pages (81/81)`
  - `✓ Finalizing page optimization`
  - Route manifest includes `ƒ /workbench-v2`

2) Production start:
- `EVAL_OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS=720000 EVAL_PASS_TIMEOUT_MS=720000 npm run start -- -p 3002`
- Result: **PASS**
- Evidence includes:
  - `✓ Ready`
  - `✅ [Instrumentation] Server startup guards passed`

3) Route smoke check:
- GET `http://localhost:3002/workbench-v2?manuscriptId=7307&evaluationJobId=e39ba4ef-ce0d-45af-ae01-d7380109d33f`
- Result: **HTTP 200**
- Response confirms active route render path and auth gate message (`Please sign in to open your Revise Workbench.`).

## Acceptance criteria mapping
- [x] `npm run build` passes
- [x] `next start -p 3002` starts cleanly
- [x] `/workbench-v2` returns HTTP 200
- [x] `/workbench-v2` appears in production route manifest
- [x] No duplicate ledger writer / no competing workbench path introduced
- [x] `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` source-of-truth behavior unchanged in active path
- [x] Non-blocking refresh/persist behavior preserved
- [ ] Authenticated UI verification on live session (requires signed-in manual pass):
  - active `ReviseCockpitClient` rendering in authenticated state
  - A/B/C cards visible at 1366×768
  - decision buttons remain visible
  - independent scroll for queue/center/ledger
  - Accept A/B/C + Keep Original/Reject/Defer/Custom persistence to `revision_ledger_decisions`
  - payload includes `sourceExcerpt`, `sourceLocation`, `criterion`, `severity`, `scope`, `queueType`, `opportunitySource`, `evidenceStatus`
  - auto-advance after decision

## Risk control
This PR intentionally avoids all dirty-branch drift by porting only active-path and build-fix files from a clean branch off current `main`.
